differential_diagnoses: Occult gastrointestinal blood loss with iron deficiency anemia
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction
Pulmonary vascular disease or occult interstitial lung disease
next_steps: Complete blood count with differential and ferritin, iron, and TIBC
Fecal immunochemical test (FIT) or occult blood testing
Repeat transthoracic echocardiography to reassess aortic valve severity and assess diastolic function
Cardiac catheterization or coronary CT angiography to assess coronary arteries prior to intervention
Cardiothoracic surgery or interventional cardiology consultation for TAVR evaluation
Pulmonary function tests (PFTs) to evaluate exertional dyspnea
